_comment: Project-level Claude Code settings. Committed to the repo so any agent (any clone, any device) inherits the same baseline. Personal overrides go in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored).

hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'detached'); DIRTY=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); echo "┌─ Questerix Fractions"; echo "├─ branch: $BRANCH  |  dirty: $DIRTY files"; echo "├─ Read CLAUDE.md first; nested CLAUDE.md auto-loads in src/scenes/interactions, src/validators, src/persistence, src/engine, src/components, src/lib, tests, pipeline"; echo "├─ Slash: /preflight /sync-curriculum /diag /learn /retro /sprint-status /c5-check /test-changed /decision"; echo "├─ Subagents: c1-c10-auditor bundle-watcher validator-parity-checker a11y-auditor"; echo "├─ Skim .claude/learnings.md for non-obvious gotchas"; echo "├─ Ignore _archive/ paths during exploration"; echo "└─ Active sprint: PLANS/master-plan-2026-04-26.md"

mkdir -p .claude && echo "[$(date '+%F %H:%M')] pre-compact | branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null) | dirty: $(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') files | last-commit: $(git log -1 --oneline 2>/dev/null)" >> .claude/_session-log.md 2>/dev/null; exit 0

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); case "$CMD" in *'git commit'*) STAGED=$(git log -1 --name-only --pretty=format: 2>/dev/null | grep -v '^$'); if echo "$STAGED" | grep -q '^src/' && ! echo "$STAGED" | grep -qE '(CHANGELOG|PLANS/|learnings\.md)'; then echo '◇ Source changed but no CHANGELOG/PLANS/learnings update — consider /retro before pushing.' >&2; fi ;; esac; exit 0

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in *vite.config.ts*|*playwright.config.ts*|*src/config/shared.ts*|*scripts/workflows/generator.mjs*) echo '▶ Config file changed — checking workflow consistency...'; npm run gen:workflows 2>/dev/null; if ! git diff --exit-code .github/workflows > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'WARNING: Workflow drift detected — commit the regenerated YAML with: git add .github/workflows && git commit' >&2; fi ;; esac; exit 0
